'''âs-z-th''' ('''kasazath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impend|impend]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impend|impend]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-z-th
|-
! Lemma
| kasazath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisazath|thisazath]] || [[word:jisazath|jisazath]] || [[word:shisazath|shisazath]] || [[word:kisazath|kisazath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusazath|thuthusazath]] || [[word:jujusazath|jujusazath]] || [[word:shushusazath|shushusazath]] || [[word:kukusazath|kukusazath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusazath|thusazath]] || [[word:jusazath|jusazath]] || [[word:shusazath|shusazath]] || [[word:kusazath|kusazath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusazath|thusazath]] || [[word:jusazath|jusazath]] || [[word:shusazath|shusazath]] || [[word:kusazath|kusazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesazath|thesazath]] || [[word:jesazath|jesazath]] || [[word:shesazath|shesazath]] || [[word:kesazath|kesazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosazath|thothosazath]] || [[word:jojosazath|jojosazath]] || [[word:shoshosazath|shoshosazath]] || [[word:kokosazath|kokosazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosazath|thosazath]] || [[word:josazath|josazath]] || [[word:shosazath|shosazath]] || [[word:kosazath|kosazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosazath|thosazath]] || [[word:josazath|josazath]] || [[word:shosazath|shosazath]] || [[word:kosazath|kosazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsazath|thĂŠsazath]] || [[word:jĂŠsazath|jĂŠsazath]] || [[word:shĂŠsazath|shĂŠsazath]] || [[word:kĂŠsazath|kĂŠsazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasazath|thathasazath]] || [[word:jajasazath|jajasazath]] || [[word:shashasazath|shashasazath]] || [[word:kakasazath|kakasazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazath|thasazath]] || [[word:jasazath|jasazath]] || [[word:shasazath|shasazath]] || [[word:kasazath|kasazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazath|thasazath]] || [[word:jasazath|jasazath]] || [[word:shasazath|shasazath]] || [[word:kasazath|kasazath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasazath|shasazath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasazath|goshasazath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasazath|gokishasazath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasazathnĂŒ|shasazathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasazathnknĂŒ|goshasazathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazathnĂŒ|gokishasazathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasazathshĂ«|shasazathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasazathnkshĂ«|goshasazathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasazathshĂ«|gokishasazathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazathro|shasazathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazathnkro|goshasazathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazathro|gokishasazathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazathmu|shasazathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazathnkmu|goshasazathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazathmu|gokishasazathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasazathsher|shasazathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasazathnksher|goshasazathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasazathsher|gokishasazathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasazathng|shasazathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasazathnkng|goshasazathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasazathng|gokishasazathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasazathya|shasazathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasazathnkya|goshasazathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasazathya|gokishasazathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasazathyam|shasazathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasazathnkyam|goshasazathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasazathyam|gokishasazathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazathnĂŒshĂ«|shasazathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasazathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasazathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazathnĂŒro|shasazathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazathnknĂŒro|goshasazathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazathnĂŒro|gokishasazathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazathnĂŒmu|shasazathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazathnknĂŒmu|goshasazathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazathnĂŒmu|gokishasazathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazathshĂ«nĂŒ|shasazathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasazathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasazathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazathshĂ«ro|shasazathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazathnkshĂ«ro|goshasazathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazathshĂ«ro|gokishasazathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazathshĂ«mu|shasazathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazathnkshĂ«mu|goshasazathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazathshĂ«mu|gokishasazathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazathronĂŒ|shasazathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazathnkronĂŒ|goshasazathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazathronĂŒ|gokishasazathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazathroshĂ«|shasazathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazathnkroshĂ«|goshasazathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazathroshĂ«|gokishasazathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazathromu|shasazathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazathnkromu|goshasazathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazathromu|gokishasazathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazathmunĂŒ|shasazathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazathnkmunĂŒ|goshasazathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazathmunĂŒ|gokishasazathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazathmushĂ«|shasazathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazathnkmushĂ«|goshasazathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazathmushĂ«|gokishasazathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazathmuro|shasazathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazathnkmuro|goshasazathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazathmuro|gokishasazathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
